description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the image registry.gitlab.com/rilis/docker-ci:ci-latest with three stages: test, stats, and docs. Add a test job in the test stage that runs: hell --install -r "=" -r "RILI_SERVICE_TIME_TESTS=ON" -i "CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=11" -G "Ninja", then mkdir build, cd build, cmake ../ -G"Ninja" -DRILI_SERVICE_TIME_TESTS=ON -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=../.hell/install -DCMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=11, ninja install, and ./rili-service-time_tests. In the stats stage add six jobs: clang-format runs find * -iname '*.hpp' -o -iname '*.cpp' | xargs clang-format -i -style=file, git status --porcelain > ../status.log, git diff, test ! -s ../status.log; coverage runs hell --install -r "=" -r "RILI_SERVICE_TIME_TESTS=ON" -r "RILI_SERVICE_TIME_COVERAGE=ON" -i "CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=11" -G "Ninja", mkdir build, cd build, cmake ../ -G"Ninja" -DRILI_SERVICE_TIME_TESTS=ON -DRILI_SERVICE_TIME_COVERAGE=ON -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=../.hell/install -DCMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=11, ninja install, ./rili-service-time_tests, cd .., lcov --directory ./build/ --capture --output-file coverage.info, lcov --remove coverage.info '/usr/include/*' '*/tests/*' '*/.hell/*' -o coverage.info, lcov --list coverage.info; cppcheck runs find * -iname '*.cpp' -o -iname '*.hpp' | cppcheck --quiet --std=c++11 --enable=warning --enable=style --enable=performance --enable=portability --enable=information --enable=missingInclude --suppress=missingIncludeSystem --file-list=- &> cppcheck.log, cat cppcheck.log, test ! -s cppcheck.log; cpplint runs find * -iname '*.cpp' -o -iname '*.hpp' | xargs cpplint.py --linelength=120 --extensions=hpp,cpp --filter=-legal/copyright,-build/include_order,-build/c++11,+build/c++14,-runtime/references; helgrind runs hell --install -r "=" -r "RILI_SERVICE_TIME_TESTS=ON" -r "RILI_SERVICE_TIME_TESTS_WITH_VALGRIND=ON" -i "CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug" -i "CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=11" -G "Ninja", mkdir build, cd build, cmake ../ -G"Ninja" -DRILI_SERVICE_TIME_TESTS=ON -DRILI_SERVICE_TIME_TESTS_WITH_VALGRIND=ON -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=../.hell/install -DCMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=11, ninja install, valgrind --tool=helgrind --error-exitcode=123 --sim-hints=no-nptl-pthread-stackcache ./rili-service-time_tests; and valgrind runs hell --install -r "=" -r "RILI_SERVICE_TIME_TESTS=ON" -r "RILI_SERVICE_TIME_TESTS_WITH_VALGRIND=ON" -i "CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug" -i "CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=11" -G "Ninja", mkdir build, cd build, cmake ../ -G"Ninja" -DRILI_SERVICE_TIME_TESTS=ON -DRILI_SERVICE_TIME_TESTS_WITH_VALGRIND=ON -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=../.hell/install -DCMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=11, ninja install, valgrind --leak-check=full --show-leak-kinds=all --error-exitcode=123 ./rili-service-time_tests. In the docs stage add a doxygen job that runs doxygen Doxyfile and publishes the doxygen/html directory as an artifact that expires in one week.
